mana_modifier.description: Signed adjustment applied to a new character's maximum mana at creation. Positive values grant a deeper mana pool (e.g. Elf); negative values shrink it (e.g. Orc).

attack_modifier.description: Signed adjustment applied to the character's combat hit chance, representing physical prowess. Positive values improve landing attacks (e.g. Orc).

description.description: One to two sentences of flavour shown at character creation, covering the race's playstyle, benefits and signature traits. Optional for backward compatibility; defaults to an empty string.
